title: NHRA Annual Report 2018 Telemedicine Services Licensing Code
summary: Official NHRA annual report states that a licensing code for regulation of telemedicine services was issued and outlines rules and guidelines for online medical consultation.

theme_notes.digital_health.telehealth_digital_servic: Telemedicine services licensing category in NHRA reporting.

notes: Related instruments: Related to NHRA health facility licensing standards
